query:
SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.programId, p.name AS programName, 
  c.id AS consultorId_match, c.name AS consultor_name, c.role AS consultor_role
FROM alunos a 
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON (c.email = a.email OR c.name = a.name)
WHERE a.isActive = 1 
AND (
  a.consultorId = 39 
  OR a.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT alunoId FROM mentoring_sessions WHERE consultorId = 39)
)
ORDER BY a.name;
